Driver and header for AS7000 heart rate monitor, plus documentation for AMS AS7000 SoC.


## Files
- **[as7000.c](as7000.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the AS7000 heart rate monitor, including functions for initialization, enabling, disabling, and handling sensor data and firmware updates.
- **[as7000.h](as7000.h.md)**: Header file for AS7000 heart rate monitor driver, defining device states, structures, and version info retrieval.
- **[README_AS7000.md](README_AS7000.md.md)**: Documentation for the AMS AS7000 SoC, detailing its boot process, loader, and application firmware.
